News

Title: Connected Over 15,000 Households to the Grid

Date: July 20, 2026Location: Siem Reap

A major rural electrification initiative successfully connected over 15,000 households to the national power grid.

The project spanned multiple provinces and required close coordination with local government units and community leaders to identify underserved areas and prioritize connections.

Advanced metering infrastructure was deployed alongside the grid connections, enabling remote monitoring and efficient billing management for the newly connected households.

Key Features

  • Connected 15,000+ households across multiple provinces
  • Deployed advanced metering infrastructure for remote monitoring
  • Coordinated with local government units and community leaders
  • Enabled efficient billing management for new connections
